texto: And uh, forget the money. Because, if you say that getting the money is the most important thing, you will spend your life wasting your time. You will be doing things you don’t like doing in order to go on living, that is, in order to do things you don’t like doing, which is stupid. Better to have a short life that is full of things you like doing than a long life spent in a miserable way.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Allan Watts: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “And uh, forget the money. Because, if you say that getting the money is the most important thing,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, career, doing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e vida.
